Name: Dragon Keeper
Description: An ancient spirit bound to guard the dragon halls. Its armor is decorated with dragon motifs.

Dialogs.Response: Welcome, brave soul. Few dare to enter the domain of the dragons. Seek the golden egg in the treasury, but beware the greedy spirit.
The great Vermithrax sleeps in the lair to the west. Do not disturb the beast unless you seek death.
The treasury lies to the east, filled with treasures beyond imagination. But greed has claimed many adventurers.
The golden egg is said to contain the essence of a newborn dragon. Only the pure of heart can claim it.

Name: Greedy Spirit
Description: A translucent figure hovering over the treasure, its eyes fixed on the gold with eternal longing.

Dialogs.Response: Mine... all mine... You cannot take what belongs to me!
The gold... the gems... they called to me in life and they bind me in death.
Leave? I cannot leave... The treasure is my prison and my purpose.
Perhaps... if you took only one item... I might let you pass. But the golden egg... never!

Name: Vermithrax the Red
Description: A colossal red dragon, its scales glowing like molten lava. Even in sleep, its presence is overwhelming.

Dialogs.Response: *The dragon's eye opens slightly* Mortal... you dare enter my domain? Speak your purpose or burn.
*Vermithrax laughs, sending flames dancing across the ceiling* You? Fight me? How adorable... and fatal.
Peace? Dragons remember every slight, every theft. But... you show courage. Leave now and live.
My hoard is legendary across the realms. The fire gem is its crown - touch it and perish.

Name: Egg Guardian
Description: A stoic warrior clad in scale mail, standing watch over the dragon nests with unwavering dedication.

Dialogs.Response: Halt! These eggs contain the future of dragonkind. Only those with noble intentions may pass.
Each egg holds a new life, a new guardian of the skies. Treat them with respect.
The phoenix feather is a gift from the sky spirits. It grants protection from fire.
Your heart seems true. You may ascend to the Sky Perch, but beware the old dragon there.

Name: Ancient Dragon
Description: An elderly dragon whose scales have turned silver with age. Its wisdom spans millennia.

Dialogs.Response: Ah, a visitor. How refreshing. I am Aethros, oldest of my kind. Sit, talk with me.
I have seen empires rise and fall. Dragons were here before the first stone was laid by human hands.
The wind stone calls to the storms. With it, one can summon gales that shake mountains.
Seek the Temple of Flames if you wish to understand the true bond between dragons and mortals.

Name: Fallen Warrior
Description: The ghost of a legendary dragon slayer, still wearing his battered armor and gripping an ethereal sword.

Dialogs.Response: Another who seeks to follow my path? Learn from my mistake, young one.
I sought glory, not understanding. The Dragonslayer Blade chose me, but pride consumed me.
The blade is no mere weapon. It judges the wielder. Only the humble may master it.
Beyond lies the Temple of Flames. There you will learn the truth about dragons and those who hunt them.

Name: High Priest of Flames
Description: A robed figure kneeling before the five-headed dragon statue, surrounded by dancing flames that do not burn.

Dialogs.Response: Blessings of the Five-Headed One be upon you. You have journeyed far, seeker.
The Dragon Gods created both fire and life. They teach us that destruction and creation are one.
The Heart of Flames is the ultimate gift. It can grant power beyond mortal comprehension.
To be worthy, you must prove yourself not as a slayer of dragons, but as their ally.
